name: Wooden Battles: Spec Ops
short_description: Wooden Battles: Spec Ops is a stealth action strategy game. Take control of a group of 4 special forces units with unique abilities, infiltrate the enemy base and complete the mission objectives. Use the in-game level editor to create your own missions and upload them to the Steam Workshop.
detailed_description:
Take control of a group of 4 special forces characters to infiltrate an enemy base without being detected. The group includes the Brute, the Demo, the Spy and the Sniper, each with their own unique set of abilities. The missions require you to avoid enemy patrol, set traps, assassinate enemy generals, and destroy enemy objectives. You will need to use the unique abilities of each of your units in order to achieve this task, stealth is key. Take out the enemies in silences, and hide the bodies to avoid being detected. Use the in-game level editor to create your own custom missions and share them on the Steam Workshop.



The Brute is the leader of the group. His abilities are stealthy knife kills, climbing wooden blocks, pushing small objects around, and constructing obstacles that obscure the enemy field of view.



The Demo specializes in explosives, His abilities are laying a silent trap, throwing firecrackers to distract enemies, placing mines, and placing bombs to destroy mission objectives..



The Spy is the master of disguise. His abilities are stealthy knife kills, disguising himself as the enemy, distracting the enemy, and ordering an enemy to go to a specific area. Watch out though, enemy Generals are able to spot the Spy even in disguise.



The Sniper is all about killing his target from a distance. His abilities are disguising himself as a bush, climbing wooden blocks, sniping enemies from a distance, and using a crossbow for silent kills.



Use the level editor to create your very own custom levels. Place game objects, log cabins, wooden blocks, wooden walls, obstacles, enemy units, friendly units, and define mission objectives. You can set patrol paths for enemies, including the desired waiting times at each node. Share your creations on the Steam Workshop, and see what other users have created.
